When `server.servlet.session.persistent` is set to `true` and the attack persists across application restarts, this may allow the attacker to read session information and hijack authenticated users or deploy a gadget chain and execute code as the application's user.\n\nAffected: Spring Boot 4.0.0–4.0.5 (fix 4.0.6), 3.5.0–3.5.13 (fix 3.5.14), 3.4.0–3.4.15 (fix 3.4.16), 3.3.0–3.3.18 (fix 3.3.19), 2.7.0–2.7.32 (fix 2.7.33); predictable temp directory / `ApplicationTemp` ownership verification. Versions that are no longer supported are also affected per vendor advisory.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00136, "percentile": 0.03336}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wwpq-f5c3-7hvx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T19:00:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wwpq-f5c3-7hvx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wwpq-f5c3-7hvx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40973"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T00:16:24Z", "published_at": "2026-04-28T00:31:41Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40973", "https://spring.io/security/cve-2026-40973", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wwpq-f5c3-7hvx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot", "summary": "Spring Boot accepts predictable temp directory without ownership verification", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T19:00:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wwpq-f5c3-7hvx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.0.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.0.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.5.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.5.0, < 3.5.14"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.4.0, <= 3.4.15"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.3.0, <= 3.3.18"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.7.32"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Spring Boot accepts predictable temp directory without ownership verification
